result.migration_notes: build_vectors.py kept at root because it is referenced by Makefile (line 52), tests/test_vector.py (hardcoded path string), src/container.py error message, src/index/builders/_memguard.py docstrings, and scripts/full_update.sh. _common.py kept at root as shared utility; moving it would cascade to churn_replay.py, benchmark_investigation.py, validate_recipe.py. graph_template.html co-located with visualize_graph.py in analysis/ (Path(__file__).parent reference). scripts/runpod/ kept unchanged (11 files). 8 dead scripts confirmed by R3 slated for deletion; 3 are symlinks to profiles/pay-com/scripts/. Additional root symlinks to profiles (auto_collect.py, analyze_gaps.py, build_method_matrix.py, build_test_map.py, check_pr_patterns.py, ci-pattern-checker.py, collect_ci_runs.py, collect_task.py, cross_validate_task.py, export_patterns.py, manage_ground_truth.py, method_level_gaps.py, task_type_checklist.py) should be rm'd as clutter; they are gitignored. Symlinks inside subdirectories (analysis/predict_failures.py, analysis/semantic_gap_scorer.py, scrape/tavily-docs-crawler.py, maint/validate_gaps.py) should also be removed. Test imports to update (E9): test_eval_file_gt.py, test_eval_verdict.py, test_fts_preclean.py, test_listwise_conversion.py, test_lpt_schedule.py, test_prepare_finetune_data.py, test_build_combined_train.py, test_scripts_common.py, test_runpod_lifecycle.py. Makefile (E10): switch-model target already correct since build_vectors.py kept at root. full_update.sh needs path updates for build_index, build_graph, build_docs_vectors, embed_missing_vectors, build_shadow_types, benchmark_queries, benchmark_realworld, detect_blind_spots, gen_repo_facts, detect_doc_staleness, extract_artifacts. eval_parallel.sh needs path updates for eval_finetune.py and merge_eval_shards.py. docs_validate_all.sh needs path updates for validate_doc_*.py and generate_housekeeping_report.py. .pre-commit-config.yaml needs path updates for 6 validate_doc_*.py scripts in scripts/maint/. src/graph/service.py needs import update for visualize_graph.py moved to scripts/analysis/. AGENTS.md references to moved scripts updated in Phase 5 (S1). profiles/pay-com/scripts/ (25 files, all gitignored) left untouched per R5.
